_comment: Beauty salon scenarios. Replace __TAG_ID_xxx__ and __PLACEHOLDER__ values.

scenarios.name: 友だち追加シナリオ（初回クーポン）
scenarios.description: 友だち追加後にウェルカム+初回クーポン

steps.messageContent: {"type":"bubble","hero":{"type":"image","url":"__SALON_IMAGE_URL__","size":"full","aspectRatio":"20:13"},"body":{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","contents":[{"type":"text","text":"友だち追加ありがとうございます!","weight":"bold","size":"lg","wrap":true},{"type":"text","text":"__SALON_NAME__へようこそ。\n初回限定の特典をご用意しました!","size":"sm","color":"#666666","margin":"md","wrap":true},{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","margin":"lg","backgroundColor":"#FDF2F8","cornerRadius":"md","paddingAll":"16px","contents":[{"type":"text","text":"初回限定クーポン","weight":"bold","color":"#BE185D"},{"type":"text","text":"__FIRST_VISIT_COUPON__","size":"lg","weight":"bold","color":"#DB2777","margin":"sm"},{"type":"text","text":"有効期限: __COUPON_EXPIRY__","size":"xs","color":"#9D174D","margin":"sm"}]}]},"footer":{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","spacing":"sm","contents":[{"type":"button","action":{"type":"message","label":"予約する","text":"予約する"},"style":"primary","color":"#DB2777"},{"type":"button","action":{"type":"message","label":"メニューを見る","text":"メニューを見る"},"style":"secondary"}]}}

こんにちは、__SALON_NAME__です!

初回クーポンはもうお使いいただけましたか?

当サロンでは、お客様一人ひとりの髪質に合わせた施術を心がけています。

お気軽に「予約する」と送ってくださいね!

scenarios.name: 来店後フォロー+次回予約促進
scenarios.description: 来店後のお礼メッセージとヘアケアアドバイス、次回予約促進

steps.messageContent:
本日はご来店ありがとうございました!

__SALON_NAME__の__STYLIST_NAME__です。

仕上がりはいかがですか?
気になる点がありましたら、お気軽にメッセージくださいね。

{"type":"bubble","body":{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","contents":[{"type":"text","text":"ホームケアのポイント","weight":"bold","size":"lg","wrap":true},{"type":"text","text":"今日の施術を長持ちさせるために...","size":"sm","color":"#666666","margin":"md","wrap":true},{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","margin":"lg","spacing":"sm","contents":[{"type":"text","text":"1. __CARE_TIP_1__","size":"sm","wrap":true},{"type":"text","text":"2. __CARE_TIP_2__","size":"sm","wrap":true},{"type":"text","text":"3. __CARE_TIP_3__","size":"sm","wrap":true}]}]}}

{"type":"bubble","body":{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","contents":[{"type":"text","text":"そろそろメンテナンスの時期です","weight":"bold","size":"lg","wrap":true},{"type":"text","text":"前回のご来店から約3週間。\nスタイルのキープにはこの時期のメンテナンスがおすすめです。","size":"sm","color":"#666666","margin":"md","wrap":true}]},"footer":{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","spacing":"sm","contents":[{"type":"button","action":{"type":"message","label":"次回予約する","text":"予約する"},"style":"primary","color":"#DB2777"},{"type":"button","action":{"type":"message","label":"もう少し後で","text":"また今度"},"style":"secondary"}]}}

こんにちは、__SALON_NAME__です。

前回のご来店から1ヶ月以上経ちました。
カラーの退色やカットのバランスが気になる頃ではないでしょうか?

リピーター様限定の特典もご用意しています。
「予約する」と送ってください!

scenarios.name: 口コミ依頼シナリオ
scenarios.description: 来店2回目以降のお客様に口コミ依頼。タグで重複排除
